ASSIGNED DEPT. 414 COURT TRIAL; NO APP. BY DEF. WIT. S/E, DOC. EVID. INTROD./W/D. JUDGMENT FOR PLTF. AGNST. DEF. MATTHEW BARDASIAN FOR $300,000. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. JUDGE SUSAN BREALL; CLERK: SANDRA STARK; REPORTER: KAREN BAUER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARDASIAN, MATTHEW $300,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

Notice Of Motion For Order Vacating And Setting Side Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-21-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Brennan J. Newson, Esq. 472-2020 for Plaintiff and opposing party

Mr. Newson represented in open court that his secretary gave timely notice of intent to argue. Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Matthew Bardasian's Motion for order vacating and setting aside default judgment GRANTED. The matter of attorney fees was argued and the Court awarded counsel $3,500 in attorney fees which is due in 15 days. (AJR/CL) Karen Farnsworth, CSR 5162
